calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Per Probate Code 17200 Regarding Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Ming Yu Wu (successor trustee).

When asked if he had anything to add, Mr. Bresler stated that he believes the supplement touched on the issues that were not included in the petition and that he has not heard of any objections. The Petition for Instructions Per Probate Code 17200 Regarding Distribution of Trust Assets is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Per Probate Code 17200 Regarding Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
